hooks.command: test -f package.json && pnpm test 2>&1 | tail -5 || true
hooks.description: Tras editar, corre tests si hay package.json

hooks.command: ./init.sh > /tmp/harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] init.sh OK' || (echo '[harness] init.sh FALLÓ' && tail -20 /tmp/harness_init.log)
hooks.description: Verificación completa antes de cerrar sesión
